data.body: TIER bright-line applied. Q1: G4 -> pure ticket analysis (code-grounding side owned by G1G2/E4). Q2: T10/T11 NOT filesystem-dependent — plan-intrinsic safety from ticket+best-practice; existence/convention/NIH checks already owned by E4/G1G2/A1 (steelman 'search code for migration patterns' = A1 NIH, covered). Reclassified G3/G4/T10/T11 AGENT->single-turn; final AGENT = E4/G1G2/A1/G6/T8/T1/T3. Q3 bright line ('probe live env => agent; else feed-context single-turn; code-grounding centralized in E4/G1G2/A1') documented in epic 6f2d (WS-DOC + concern + AC + worked example); recorded on 5fd2; criteria_v8 + 2 harness sets updated, guard passes; report corrected. Committed.
